input.headline: LeBron James plays 23rd NBA season vs. players born after he started

raw.headline: LeBron James plays 23rd NBA season vs. players born after he started

winner: LeBron James is like a time traveler who keeps forgetting his own birth year—every season, he faces kids who were just learning how to tie their shoes when he first stepped on the court.

candidates.text: LeBron James just announced his 23rd season, so I asked a kid from his first one about it. He said, 'I don’t even remember him being a baby, and he’s still acting like one.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on age comparison, specific reference to LeBron's 23rd season, concise and natural humor."}

candidates.text: LeBron James just signed with a new team—it's the "Born After You" squad. They've been waiting their whole lives for this moment, and honestly, I think they're still processing it.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Humorous twist on LeBron's age relative to younger players, with a clever team name and relatable punchline."}

candidates.text: LeBron James says his new rookie squad is like playing with kids—except these kids can still dunk on him before they learn how to tie their shoes.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison between LeBron's experience and rookie players' abilities, with a specific and humorous twist on their physical capabilities."}

candidates.text: LeBron James is like a time traveler who keeps forgetting his own birth year—every season, he faces kids who were just learning how to tie their shoes when he first stepped on the court.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative time-travel metaphor, specific reference to LeBron's longevity, and ties in the generational gap humorously."}

candidates.text: LeBron James just scored his 50th point of the game—turns out that’s one more than all the rookies born after 2003 combined.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising comparison, specific stats, concise and funny"}
